name: IMPOSSIBALL
short_description: A Strange and Silly Adventure with a challenge!
detailed_description:
IMPOSSIBALL is a silly and strange adventure made by a two man team where you must rescue "The Golden pin" from the clutches of evil whilst traveling through time. Take on many difficult levels such as
*The Wild West
*An Ancient Temple
*A Pirate Ship
*A Cyberpunk City
*Outer Space
*A Medieval Town
And Many More!

In IMPOSSIBALL you play as a red Bowling ball that won't stop rolling and you must avoid whatever obstacles are thrown your way!
about_the_game:

reviews.review_text: Careful: Space is both Jump and Skip cutscene. Game speed heavily depends on graphics settings, so can make gameplay too slow or very fast. Looks and sounds nice with well-designed levels. With more work fixing UI bits, it'd be worth a fiver.
